titleStmt.title: SII 36.185: original edition by P Shanmugam

No. 185. (A.R. No. 185 of 1910.) PĀRIYŪR (Pāriyūrgrāmam), GOBICHETTIPALAYAM TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the east and north bases of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Amaraphaṇīśvara temple.

p.hi: Kulōttuṅga III. Year 3 and 10th day: A.D. 1182.

summary.p: Records an order of the king remitting the tax voṭṭachchu on more than 20 Nāḍus, and 7 Śaiva temples in the Vaḍa Koṅgu country. The order stipulates some conditions for its adherence and one of the conditions was that Sāmantas who conquer the said territories in future shall not demand tax.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī parakeśari svastiśrī [trabhuva*]na cakravatti koneriṉme koṇṭān vaṭa koṅkil naraiyaṉūr nāṭu Amutāmuttaṉāṭāna rājarājapuramum poṅkalūkkāṉāṭṭi ruḷḷiṭṭa rum Alaṅkayam tanicciyamum poṅkalūkkāṉāṭum tenkarai nāṭum Aṇṭa nāṭum kalaiyūr nāṭum vaṭakarai maṇalūr nāṭum Araiya nāṭum kīḻaṅka nāṭum veṅkala nāṭum taṭṭaiyūr nāṭum Iṭaippaḻuti nāṭum kāṅkaiya nāṭum vīracoḻa vaḷanāṭum valuppukkā nāṭum kuṟuppu nāṭum vaṭaparicāra nāṭum kāñcikkūval nāṭum muntuṟai nāṭum kīḻappā nāṭum vaṭakarai nāṭum In nāṭukaḷil paṟṟiluḷḷa voṭṭaccu Iḻantom kūttāṭu nāyināṟkut tāṅkaḷiṭṭuk kuṭuttavamaipaṭi Oṭṭikku nam Olaiyiṭṭut taṇṭik kaṭavatallavākavum nāṭupiṭitta(ta) cāmantakaḷu kaṇṭukoḷa kuṭukkakkaṭavarkaḷillavākavum nam Olai kuṭuttu vara mavarkaḷukku nammeḻuttiṭṭuk kaḻaittuviṭum Olaikkup paṇam Onṟum nām Eḻuttiṭṭamai colliviṭum Olaikkup paṇam Onṟum kuṭuttup povārkaḷākavum nam tūtaṟku vaḻivaravu coṟiṭakkaṭavarkaḷallavākilum Ivarkaḷukku kaiyyarici yerikka kaṭavarkaḷallavākavum ppaṇamā ma kuṭuttup potu
brāhmaṇakkāṇiyā kum tānattāṟkum tiruppāṇṭik koṭumuṭit tānattāṟkum tirukkaruvūrt tānattāṟkum tirumukkuṭit tānattāṟkum tiruveñcamākkūṭat tā tirumurukanpūṇṭit tānattāṟkum Avināciyāḷuṭaiyār koyil tānattāṟkum naniyūr tānattāṟkum nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Innāṭukaḷil tirukkoyilḷoṭṭaccu pūṇṭu munpuyiṟuttup potukaiyil yinta tirukkoyilkaḷukku pūjeyum kaṟiyamutupaṭiya t tirukkoyil tirukkāppuk koṇṭu yiṟaiyāṟṟātu pokaiyil mūnṟāvatu mutal tirukkoyilāḷvarkaḷ kuṭuttup potuvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku namakku yivarkaḷ tanta Accu vaṟunūṟum toṇṭaimānāṟku kā cattukkut tanta Accu nūṟumāka Accu Eḻuṉūṟum nam Olaippaṭi peṟṟuḷaṟkuk kuṭukkaiyilivvaccukkup pata Accut tarakkaṭavarkaḷallavākavum Ippaṭikku cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭik koḷvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikkup piṭipāṭāka nam Olaikuṭuttom tribhuvana vīratevaṟku yāṇṭu mūnṟāvatu nāṭ pattu Ivai toṇṭaimān Eḻuttu Ivai kurukularāyan Eḻuttu Ivai veṇāvuṭaiyān Eḻuttuyitu panmāheśvara rakṣai .~
Digital edition of SII 36.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
